channel.title: Comparison on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Comparison on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: Jamba Reasoning 3B vs Phi-4-mini-reasoning: Which Small Reasoning Model Should You Run Locally?
item.description: Jamba Reasoning 3B vs Phi-4-mini-reasoning: architecture, benchmarks, context length, RAM requirements, and which small reasoning model to run locally.

item.title: LFM2.5-8B-A1B vs ZAYA1-8B: Which 8B MoE Reasoning Model Should You Run Locally?
item.description: LFM2.5-8B-A1B vs ZAYA1-8B: two 8B-class sparse MoE reasoning models compared on benchmarks, generation speed, memory footprint, deployment, and licensing.

item.title: North Mini Code vs Qwen3.6-35B-A3B: Which Local Coding MoE Wins?
item.description: North Mini Code 1.0 vs Qwen3.6-35B-A3B head-to-head: coding benchmarks, GGUF sizes, VRAM headroom on a 24 GB GPU, context windows, and which 3B-active MoE to pick.

item.title: The Best Local Vision Language Models in 2026: Small VLMs You Can Actually Run
item.description: A practical comparison of the best local vision language models in 2026, from 4B VLMs to 32B, with real MMMU and DocVQA benchmarks and VRAM estimates.

item.title: Qwen3.5-4B vs Phi-4-mini: Choosing the Right 4B Model for Local Inference
item.description: Qwen3.5-4B vs Phi-4-mini: a direct comparison of benchmarks, VRAM, context windows, and multimodal support for the two best 4B local models in 2026.

item.title: Ollama vs LM Studio vs llama.cpp: Which Local AI Runtime Should You Use?
item.description: Ollama vs LM Studio vs llama.cpp compared: setup, performance, API support, and which runtime to pick for your hardware and use case in 2026.

item.title: The Best Small Language Models in 2026: A Practical Comparison
item.description: A practical guide to the best small language models in 2026—Phi-4-mini, SmolLM3-3B, Gemma 3 4B, Qwen3, and more—with benchmarks, VRAM requirements, and honest use-case picks.
